You are being given a Skill to execute for the user's next request.

Use the following SKILL.md as your instructions:

<SKILL.md>
---
name: web-design-guidelines
description: Build polished, accessible frontend applications with modern design patterns.
---

# Web Design Guidelines

Follow these guidelines when building web applications.

- Use semantic HTML elements for accessibility.
- Apply responsive layout patterns with CSS Grid or Flexbox.
- Ensure color contrast meets WCAG AA standards.
- Provide keyboard navigation support for interactive elements.
</SKILL.md>
